summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Client Cabinet system including demo login, sidebar navigation, ClientHub dashboard, and Support system with ticket creation functionality
passed_tests: ClientLayout shows sidebar with Dashboard, Projects, Deliverables, Support, New Request
ClientHub shows stats: Active Projects, Awaiting Approval, Open Tickets, Completed
ClientHub shows Support widget and Quick Actions
Navigate to Support page via sidebar
Support page shows stats: Total Tickets, Open, In Progress, Resolved
Support page has tabs: All, Open, In Progress, Resolved
New Ticket modal has Type selection (Bug, Improvement, Question)
New Ticket modal has Title, Description, Priority fields
All sidebar navigation items work correctly
Logout button is present and accessible
